# Install the Application

## Introduction

This guide covers the steps required to install the application on your system.

## Prerequisites

Before you begin, ensure you have:

- Python 3.11 or later
- pip or a compatible package manager

## Steps

1. Download the package from the repository.
2. Run the installer with `pip install structure-parser`.
3. Verify the installation with `structure-parser --help`.

## Next Steps

After installing, see the configuration guide.
